Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=d.get\('result',{}\); print\('status:', r.get\('effects',{}\).get\('status'\)\); print\('gasUsed:', r.get\('effects',{}\).get\('gasUsed'\)\); print\('events:'\); [print\(' -', ev['type'].split\('::'\)[-1], '=>', {k:v for k,v in ev.get\('parsedJson',{}\).items\(\) if k != 'encrypted_content'}\) for ev in r.get\('events',[]\)]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); evs=d.get\('result',{}\).get\('data',[]\); hit=[e for e in evs if e.get\('parsedJson',{}\).get\('vault_id'\)=='0x218a5e3e4ed9f1fc16e1e137b411dd71cf49e68483145507b5234db4fa274457']; print\('matched events:',len\(hit\)\); [print\(' digest:',e.get\('id',{}\).get\('txDigest'\),'respondent:',e['parsedJson']['respondent'],'claimed_at_ms:',e['parsedJson']['claimed_at_ms']\) for e in hit]")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 9068 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Id 13288 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5173,3000 } | Select-Object LocalPort,OwningProcess)

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5173,3000 } | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -in 5173,3000 } | Measure-Object\).Count)
